arts.ttl: Juventus manager Thiago Motta addresses criticism and team selection ahead of Genoa clash
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare to face Genoa in their sixth Serie A fixture, manager Thiago Motta spoke to DAZN about his team selection and recent criticism of the squad’s performances. Addressing the decision to start Danilo, Motta expressed confidence in his player: “I trust him, as I do all our players. We only have strong players. I’m convinced that the starting eleven will put in a good performance and achieve a positive result.” The Juventus boss acknowledged recent criticism of the team’s goal-scoring struggles but defended their overall solidity: “The criticisms are fair – when we don’t manage to score, it’s The post Juventus manager Thiago Motta addresses criticism and team selection ahead of Genoa clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Danilo set to start for Juventus against Genoa, but future remains uncertain
arts.sum: Danilo is finally set to return to Juventus’ starting lineup for their match against Genoa today, as surprisingly revealed by manager Thiago Motta in yesterday’s press conference. The Brazilian defender has found himself lower in the pecking order so far this season, even falling behind new signing Pierre Kalulu at times. While Danilo will get the nod at Marassi, this doesn’t necessarily mean he has regained a permanent spot among the first-choice defenders. There are still many uncertainties surrounding his role and future at the club. Danilo’s current contract with Juventus expires in June 2025.
